description: Updates information for an existing logging service within your Fivetran account.

parameters.name: logId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the log service within the Fivetran system.

enabled.description: The boolean value specifying whether the log service is enabled.

config.description: The setup configuration. Check possible config formats in [create method](/docs/rest-api/api-reference/log-service-management/add-log-service/)
